summary: Tested responsive modal patterns for RetailPro. All modals correctly implement responsive behavior: centered modal on desktop (>768px) and bottom sheet with drag handle on mobile (<768px). Fixed minor bug in inventory products page.

bugs_fixed.issue: setSkuAutoGenerate was not defined - should be setGlobalSkuAutoGenerate
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed setSkuAutoGenerate(true) to setGlobalSkuAutoGenerate(true) on line 233

login_flow_admin.details: Login as admin@fmcg.com / Admin@2025 works correctly. Redirects to dashboard.

dashboard_loads.details: RetailPro Dashboard loads correctly with sidebar navigation, stats cards, and linked apps.

inventory_products_webmodal_desktop.details: At width 1920px, Add Product modal shows as centered modal floating in center with semi-transparent backdrop.

inventory_products_webmodal_mobile.details: At width 390px, Add Product modal shows as bottom sheet sliding up from bottom with visible drag handle (40px x 4px gray bar).

unitxt_templates_webmodal_desktop.details: At width 1920px, New Template modal shows as centered modal with form fields for template name, type (SMS/WhatsApp), and content.

unitxt_templates_webmodal_mobile.details: At width 390px, New Template modal shows as bottom sheet with drag handle. Same form content, responsive layout.

kwikpay_transactions_page.details: Transactions page loads correctly on both desktop and mobile. No transactions present to test detail modal, but page UI is responsive.

actionsheetmodal_pattern.details: ActionSheetModal.tsx implements same responsive pattern: centered on desktop, bottom sheet on mobile. Used for action menus in inventory products.

desktop_behavior.style: Centered modal - floating in center of screen
features: Close on backdrop click or Escape key

mobile_behavior.style: Bottom sheet - slides up from bottom
features: Drag handle at top (40px x 4px, rgb(209,213,219))

components_tested: ActionSheetModal.tsx - Action menu modal with same responsive pattern
pages_tested: /kwikpay/transactions - Page loads, WebModal for Transaction Details (no test data)
critical_code_review_comments: Responsive modal pattern correctly implemented using isDesktop = Platform.OS === 'web' && width > 768
WebModal uses Animated.spring for smooth bottom sheet animation
Drag handle styling is consistent across all modal components
Fixed bug: setSkuAutoGenerate -> setGlobalSkuAutoGenerate in products.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive modal pattern is fully implemented and tested. Desktop (>768px) uses centered modals, Mobile (<768px) uses bottom sheets with drag handles. WebModal, ActionSheetModal, and SuccessModal all follow the same responsive pattern. Bug fixed: setSkuAutoGenerate was undefined in products.tsx, changed to setGlobalSkuAutoGenerate.
